posts.author: lzoucas (Leandro)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, team! I am new in Monday community and hope this is the proper space to ask about the following:
I’ve been using an automation for several months and then it stopped working as expected: Automation used to have the following template:
Everyday, if date has passed, then notify in Slack channel…
The problem i that, suddenly, it was changed to:
Everyday, if date has passed in the last 7 days, notify in Slack channel…

So, now, automation only works in the first 7 days, then it does not notify anymore. Any idea about it?

posts.author: AnishJ (Anish)
posts.cookedHtml:
It can be very quick fix
I am assuming you are using this automation

image2336×1114 34.1 KB

Can you check if date/timeline are perfectly matched with you board

Remember you must have Date column for this too work

posts.author: evernon9 (Erica Vernon)
posts.cookedHtml: I am having this same issue, but not including the Slack channel. I need this automation to work even if 7 days has passed since the due date. Does anyone know of any solutions?
